title: Claude 3.5 Sonnet vs GPT-4o
summary: For pure strategic writing and complex coding, Claude 3.5 wins. For universal utility and voice interaction, GPT-4o remains the king.
verdict: Use Claude for your 'Boardroom' work and GPT-4o for your daily admin and creative brainstorming.

title: Perplexity AI vs Google Search
summary: The era of clicking 10 blue links is over. Perplexity provides verified answers, while Google provides ads and SEO spam.
verdict: Perplexity is the researcher's choice. Google is now just for local business lookups and shopping.

title: Lex.page vs Jasper AI
summary: Jasper is for marketing departments. Lex is for writers who want to scale their own unique voice.
verdict: If you are a solo founder building a personal brand, Lex is your essential writing partner.
